response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering depth and seniority across multiple domains, this role has three critical disqualifiers: native-level Japanese proficiency is a hard requirement and completely absent from the resume; the entire career trajectory focuses on web/full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than embedded systems and security; and there is zero evidence of experience with the core technical domains required (encryption/MACsec, 802.1X authentication, network switch operation, kernel-level work, or embedded firmware development). The candidate would require a complete career pivot and language acquisition to be viable.
strengths: 20+ years of senior-level software development experience with proven ability to master new technologies and programming languages
Demonstrated C/C++ systems programming background through LabWindows/CVI work and embedded projects (robotic arms, hardware orchestration)
Strong Linux familiarity and experience with infrastructure tooling (CI/CD, Docker, deployment systems) relevant to embedded product development
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency listed as required qualification but completely absent from resume (English, Romanian, and German listed instead)
No demonstrated experience with security technologies (encryption, key exchange, MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection, attack detection) which are core to the role

Recent career focused on web development and full-stack engineering; no background in embedded networking, switch products, firmware development, or networking protocols (Layer-2/3, SNMP, NETCONF, Telemetry)

key_factors.factor: Career in web/full-stack development vs. embedded networking/firmware
